title: Frosty Sugarlace Greek Treat
description: A festive and buttery dessert featuring pink food coloring, perfect for a festive snack.

ingredients.name: Skim milk powder (or any non-dairy milk alternative)

instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine Greek yogurt and skim milk powder. Mix until smooth.
Add vanilla extract and pink food coloring if using. Mix well until the mixture reaches your desired consistency and color.

If you prefer a tadka flavor, heat up some oil in a pan over medium heat. Add the chosen spices (e.g., cumin seeds, mustard seeds) and cook for about 30 seconds or until fragrant. Pour this tadka into the yogurt mixture and mix well to incorporate the flavors.
Serve immediately as a festive snack.
